emails.subject: Posting and the ADA
emails.body: Posting and the ADA My name is Jim Little. I am a forth year Enron employee and a third year student at South Texas College of Law. I am writing in response to a posting with your group for a Sr. Legal Specialist. The posting itself contains no information about the job other than the fact that it is in the Labor and Employment Department. I realize the expectation may be that I contact the recruiter directly; however, I felt efficiency would be served in contacting you directly. I would appreciate any information you may provide including both duties and necessary qualifications. I would also appreciate you considering speaking with me in the near future concerning a paper I am writing about individuals with HIV and the protections they are afforded under the ADA. I feel comfortable that Enron has addressed this issue and I am merely guessing that you would have been involved in such discussion or have familiarity through your various writings on the ADA. I am still researching the topic, so it will be a few weeks before I would feel able to ask intelligent questions. But I would appreciate knowing at this time if this is something you are able and willing to discuss. Thank you for your time, Jim Little x37703

emails.subject: RE: Posting and the ADA
emails.body: RE: Posting and the ADA Happy to talk with you about the ADA I've actually written two papers on the topic and edited an article in The Houston Lawyer on your very topic (albeit several years ago, which was before the Supremes spoke on the issue). On the Senior Specialist position, I am happy to discuss that with you as well. Please get with my assistant, Twanda Sweet, at 39402 to schedule a time next week to talk. Michelle To: Cash, Michelle

emails.subject: RE: Posting and the ADA
emails.body: Michelle, I have schedule with Twanda for Wednesday the 24th at 3:00pm. Thanks again, Jim To: Little Jr., Jim
